summary: The AO system favors **load-sharing**, not purely rigid loading, emphasizing balanced force distribution across fracture sites—especially critical in compromised bones like those seen in pathologic fractures. Even with good bone buttress, optimal outcomes align with minimizing stress concentration through shared load transfer during healing.
